title: diplazium hewittii
intro: Diplazium hewittii, also known as Hewitt's maidenhair fern, is a species of fern native to the Himalayas. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Diplazium hewittii are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
